name: PBPro Portable Net System
description: The PBPro Portable Net System sets up regulation-height play on any flat surface in under 5 minutes. The powder-coated steel frame with center post support keeps the net taut at 34 inches center height, and the whole system packs into an included carry bag weighing just 22 lbs.
care_instructions: After outdoor use, wipe down the steel frame to prevent rust. Store the net dry to prevent mildew. Check the center post tension mechanism periodically and lubricate with WD-40 if it becomes stiff.
